news.headline: NATO's Rutte: There is no reason to doubt Trump's commitment to NATO.
"Europe Baby Food and Infant Formula Market projected to reach $71.06 billion by 2033 from $32.22 billion in 2024."
news.summary: The Europe Baby Food and Infant Formula market is projected to grow substantially, with an estimated value of US$71.06 billion anticipated by 2033, a significant increase from US$32.22 billion recorded in 2024. This growth is forecasted to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.19% from 2025 to 2033. Factors contributing to this expansion include factors such as higher disposable incomes, evolving parental convenience preferences, advancements in nutrition science, and a heightened awareness of infant health. The report detailing this analysis is available at ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Gibraltar to present at Sidoti Small-Cap Conference, Chairman & CEO to speak on March 19, 2025, at 10:45 a.m. ET. $ROCK #ROCK.
news.summary: Gibraltar Industries, Inc., a prominent manufacturer in the renewable energy, residential, agtech, and infrastructure sectors, revealed that Chairman and CEO Bill Bosway and VP, Corporate Controller Lori Rizzo will be speaking at the Sidoti Small-Cap Conference on March 19, 2025, at 10:45 a.m. ET. They will also be engaging in meetings with investors on the same day. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ROCK.

news.summary: The AGM acknowledged the management's review and reviewed and endorsed the Annual Report 2024, including statements from the Executive Board and the Board of Directors, along with the independent auditors' report.

news.headline: Marius Žemaitis appointed as new management board member of UAB "LORDS LB ASSET MANAGEMENT" for UTIISIB UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos," approved by Bank of Lithuania.
news.summary: The closed-end investment company for informed investors, UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos,” announced that Marius Žemaitis has been approved by the Bank of Lithuania as a new management board member of the investment company’s management company, UAB "LORDS LB ASSET MANAGEMENT." Žemaitis has commenced his role as a management board member. The details of the updated management board of the Management Company have been officially recorded in the Register of Legal Entities of the Republic of Lithuania.

news.headline: Bridgemarq Real Estate Services reported annual revenue of $350.7 million, generating a net loss of $10.3 million in 2024 compared to $4.0 million in 2023. Despite this, they declared a monthly dividend of $0.1125 per Restricted Voting Share. Market soared by 50% in Q4 2024. The franchise network had 20,283 REALTORS® under 280 franchise agreements from 684 locations as of Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Bridgemarq Real Estate Services Inc. reported its annual consolidated financial results for 2024, highlighting a significant growth in assets, with total proceeds of approximately $40.9 million from acquisitions. The revenue for 2024 amounted to $350.7 million, a substantial increase from the prior year's $48.5 million due to the acquired businesses. However, the Company faced a net loss of $10.3 million in 2024 compared to a net profit of $4.0 million in 2023 primarily due to non-operating losses. Cash provided by operating activities increased by $3.4 million, and Adjusted Net Earnings declined to $7.3 million in 2024 from $12.4 million in 2023. The Company generated $16.8 million in free cash flow in 2024. The Canadian residential real estate market expanded significantly in 2024, with a 50% increase in Q4 compared to 2023, and 12% increase for the full year. The Company declared a cash dividend of $0.1125 per Restricted Voting Share payable on April 30, 2025, and had a network comprising 20,283 REALTORS® operating under 280 franchise agreements. Bridgemarq Real Estate Services Inc. is optimistic about its future in the Canadian real estate market and aims to offer tailored solutions to Canadians. The Company will host a conference call on March 14, 2025, to discuss its financial results.

news.headline: InPlay Oil Corp. shares 2024 financial results, with $68.5M AFF, $153.7M in sales, and average daily production of 8,712 boe/d. #PositiveFutureAhead
news.summary: InPlay Oil Corp. has announced its financial results for the three and twelve months ending December 31, 2024. The company achieved an average annual production of 8,712 boe/d, with adjusted funds flow of $68.5 million. They distributed $16.4 million in dividends and invested $63 million in development capital. InPlay's net debt was $60.9 million, and they operated a 0.8x net debt to EBITDA ratio. The company renewed its $110 million revolving Senior Credit Facility. In 2024, InPlay drilled 15 wells and focused on operational efficiencies. The article highlights the company's disciplined capital allocation approach, strong operational execution, and shareholder returns. InPlay expects the Pembina Cardium asset acquisition to drive growth in 2025. The company also provided an overview of its operational updates and hedging strategies for 2025. Additionally, the article details the reserves results for 2024, showcasing proved developed producing reserves of 17,207 mboe and NPV BT10 reserve values. This comprehensive summary encompasses InPlay Oil Corp.'s financial and operational performance, strategic acquisitions, capital allocations, and future growth opportunities for shareholders.

news.headline: Economics professor Ali Hortaçsu joins FTI Consulting's subsidiary Compass Lexecon, enhancing expertise.

Ogden Distinguished Service Professor of Economics at the University of Chicago, with its subsidiary Compass Lexecon. Dr. Hortaçsu's significant expertise in the field is anticipated to bolster Compass Lexecon's capabilities. The announcement signifies a notable partnership in the business world.

York Region Transit in Ontario signed a contract for 170 Xcelsior clean-diesel buses from NFI, strengthening sustainability efforts.
news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on March 14, 2025, NFI Group Inc. (NFI), a top independent bus and coach maker, revealed a noteworthy achievement. Their subsidiary, New Flyer Industries Canada ULC (New Flyer), secured a substantial deal with York Region Transit (YRT) for 170 Xcelsior® clean-diesel transit buses, equating to 268 equivalent units (EUs). This contract further establishes New Flyer's standing as a key supplier of eco-friendly transportation solutions and contributes to NFI's Q4 2024 backlog.

news.headline: US stock futures rise as shutdown risk decreases; Markets Wrap.
ZKsync halts Ignite program amidst bearish market, ending TVL at $139M vs. peak $270M. ZK token drops 76% from Dec high of $0.26 to $0.06.
news.summary: ZKsync's DeFi Steering Committee announced the discontinuation of ZKsync Ignite, a liquidity reward program, as the project shifts focus to broader network expansion. Ignite's second season was cancelled, with the program set to end on March 17. ZKsync will concentrate resources on its Elastic Network, aiming to create an ecosystem of interconnected ZK chains. Market conditions influenced the decision, with ZK token prices dropping 76% to $0.06 from a high of $0.26 in 2024. Ignite drove TVL to over $270 million, but it has decreased to $139 million. Originally planning to allocate 300 million ZK tokens over nine months, the first season allocated 100 million tokens, now worth $6.8 million. The broader crypto market is also facing a downturn, with assets like Bitcoin and Ether struggling. Overall, ZKsync is repositioning itself amidst industry challenges towards interoperability and network expansion, with a focus on the Elastic Network.

news.headline: Bitcoin price stuck in $5,500 range since March 9 at $78,599 to $84,000 due to various factors like trade tensions and weakening demand.
news.summary: Bitcoin's price has been fluctuating between $78,599 and $84,000 since March 9 due to various factors such as Trump's trade war tensions, weakening demand, and broader economic uncertainty. Trump's new policies and trade tariffs have caused market uncertainty, affecting Bitcoin's demand. Glassnode data shows weakening demand as capital flows decrease and funding rates hover close to 0%. Bitcoin faces resistance at the 200-day SMA at $83,736, indicating a sustained recovery is challenging. Without a clear catalyst, Bitcoin remains in a tight range vulnerable to pullbacks toward $70,000. Traders are advised to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.

Ulta Beauty beats Q4 revenue estimates with $3.49 billion, earnings exceed expectations at $8.46 per share. Analysts adjust forecasts downwards.

Earnings per share for the quarter stood at $8.46, higher than the predicted $7.14 per share as per Benzinga Pro. The company's CEO, Kecia, expressed optimism about Ulta Beauty's future, citing a solid business model, a strategic long-term plan, and dedicated employees as key drivers for success. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

AECOM named Official Venue Infrastructure Partner for Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games, providing services for 50+ venues.
news.summary: AECOM (NYSE: ACM), a leading global infrastructure corporation, has been designated as the Official Venue Infrastructure Partner for the upcoming LA28 Olympic and Paralympic Games as well as Team USA. Their involvement spans infrastructure architecture, engineering, planning, program management, and construction management services. AECOM's support will encompass the extensive execution of the venue infrastructure program for the Games, which is set to showcase over 50 Olympic events.

news.headline: Bonterra Energy achieves record production in 2024, with 14,846 BOE per day on average, 5% growth YoY. Funds flow at $118.7M. Net debt at $167.2M. Charlie Lake asset has 2,100 BOE per day production, Montney well producing 575 BOE per day. Reserves growth of 5-6%. Refinanced debt with $135M Senior Secured Second Lien Notes. Operations update on various wells provided.
news.summary: Bonterra Energy Corp. has reported its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. Production in 2024 averaged 14,846 barrels of oil equivalent (BOE) per day, a five percent year-over-year growth. Funds Flow and Adjusted Free Funds Flow for 2024 totaled $118.7 million and $10.5 million, respectively. Net Debt stood at $167.2 million at year-end. Reserves grew by five percent in Proved Developed Producing, six percent in Total Proved, and five percent in Total Proved plus Probable categories. Bonterra acquired the Charlie Lake Assets for $23.6 million in cash in 2024. The company's Charlie Lake asset has achieved production rates of approximately 2,100 BOE per day, including 685 barrels of light crude oil. The Montney asset, with a first well producing 575 BOE per day, is also showing promising results. Bonterra refinanced its debt post-year end with $135 million of Senior Secured Second Lien Notes. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Harts Plumbers, Electricians, & HVAC Technicians advise on Fix-a-Leak Week. Founded in 2013, Tacoma-based provider offers expert tips.
news.summary: A leading home services provider based in Tacoma is emphasizing the importance of homeowners remaining vigilant in monitoring for leaks to prevent expensive repairs. Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, established in 2013 and highly rated, is prompting this reminder. It is crucial for homeowners to regularly inspect for leaks as unnoticed issues can lead to significant costs down the line.

news.summary: A prominent home service company in Chicago celebrated over 100 years of providing comfort by offering a wide array of services. On March 14, 2025, Deljo Heating, Cooling & Plumbing revealed their expansion plans, reinforcing their position as the top choice for home services in the Chicago region.

news.headline: Hot Chili Limited adds La Verde Copper Mine, confirms significant Cu-Au discovery in Costa Fuego. Pre-feasibility study in final stages.
news.summary: Perth, Australia - On March 14, 2025, Hot Chili announced the acquisition of the former La Verde Copper Mine (La Verde) to its Costa Fuego coastal copper hub. The company also confirmed a noteworthy Cu-Au porphyry discovery. The Costa Fuego Cu-Au Pre-feasibility Study (PFS) has reached its final stages, showcasing promising developments.

news.headline: R1 and Palantir partner to launch R37 AI lab for healthcare finance, aiming to revolutionize performance.
news.summary: R1, a renowned revenue cycle management company with more than 20 years of experience, has joined forces with Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR), a prominent artificial intelligence firm. Together, they have established R37, a cutting-edge AI lab aimed at transforming healthcare financial operations. Leveraging R1's extensive knowledge in payer-provider interactions and advanced technology with Palantir's state-of-the-art AI technology, the lab will work on developing innovative solutions. This partnership brings together two industry leaders to drive advancements in healthcare finance.

news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Ra'anana, Israel, the CEO of Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. released a letter. Inspira Technologies, a company at the forefront of respiratory support and real-time blood-monitoring, based out of Ra'anana, Israel, shared significant updates. As a Nasdaq-listed company under the ticker symbol IINN, Inspira Technologies continues to innovate in the field of healthcare technology.

news.headline: Wayfair to open new 150,000-square-foot store in Atlanta in 2026, second large-format store in the city.
